debug_info.goal:
t : ℝ
ht : 0 < t
⊢ DifferentiableAt ℝ GReal t

unfold GReal
  exact (G_holo.differentiable.restrictScalars ℝ).re.differentiableAt.comp t

apply DifferentiableAt.re
